subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Analyze the emotions and behavior of Kezia and her father
Understand the significance of key events in shaping character
Identify the story’s themes and moral lessons
Develop critical thinking and inferential reading skills
Sequence events accurately and summarize effectively

lesson_plan.title: Introduction and Story Context
topics_covered: Background and setting of the story
Main characters: Kezia and her father
teaching_strategy: Discussion on family relationships and emotions
Board notes on story context and characters
student_activities: Predict the storyline based on title and introduction
Discuss personal experiences with family guidance or strictness

lesson_plan.title: Detailed Reading – Part 1
topics_covered: Kezia’s daily life and thoughts about her father
teaching_strategy: Guided reading with explanations of difficult words

lesson_plan.title: Detailed Reading – Part 2
topics_covered: Father’s response and change in relationship
Consequences of events on character development
teaching_strategy: Teacher-led discussion on cause and effect
Comparative analysis of father–daughter relationship before and after incidents
student_activities: List key events in chronological order
Explain the significance of each event in 1–2 sentences

lesson_plan.title: Character Analysis
topics_covered: Traits of Kezia and her father
student_activities: Write character traits with supporting examples
Explain how specific events shape their actions

lesson_plan.title: Theme, Values, and Critical Thinking
topics_covered: Main theme: Understanding and love in family relationships
Values of empathy, patience, and care
Critical thinking: Lessons from father–daughter interactions
teaching_strategy: Question prompts to encourage reasoning and opinion
student_activities: Discuss examples of care and understanding in groups

lesson_plan.title: Vocabulary, Summary, and Reflection
topics_covered: New vocabulary and phrases from the story
teaching_strategy: Board explanation of summary writing and vocabulary
student_activities: List new words with meanings and use in sentences
Write an 8–10 sentence summary with analysis
Reflect on how understanding emotions improves relationships

teacher_tip: Encourage students to infer character motivations, analyze cause and effect, and connect story lessons to their own experiences with family and relationships.
